text.title: Design Docs at Big Tech Companies Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every Design Docs at Big Tech Companies application must enforce. These are HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Design doc MUST exist before implementation PR opens.
Doc weight MUST match decision scope (≤4 pages team, ≤6 pages cross-org, ≤10 pages company-wide).
rule.rationale: Heavy docs for small scope kill momentum; light docs for big scope miss alternatives.

rule.statement: Alternatives section MUST include 'do nothing' with rationale.
rule.rationale: Without 'do nothing', the doc is advocacy, not analysis.

rule.statement: Every doc MUST set a review deadline when circulated.
LLM may draft prose but MUST NOT author the alternatives section; humans pick alternatives.
